validator_assessment.weakest_link: PMH 657.47 is only 2-star strength (breakable ~35% of the time); consensus treats it as near-certain resistance while overnight buyers defended 655.00 constructively despite rising VIX — a breakout to 658.00–659.00 is materially underweighted.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY opens above 657.47 and closes a 5m bar above 658.00 by 09:45 ET with elevated volume, triggering the level_thesis secondary bullish scenario and directly inverting the primary bearish thesis.

primary.condition: if SPY fails at 657.47 PMH on first RTH approach (BEAR ribbon + rising VIX = most probable path)

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks above 657.47 with a 5m close above 658.00 on elevated volume

invalidation.condition: SPY opens above 657.47 and closes above 658.00 by 09:45 ET with volume, OR VIX drops below 25.00 within 30 min of RTH open
invalidation.effect: Primary bearish thesis invalidated — risk-off macro backdrop reverses and/or PMH resistance fails; shifts to no_trade or secondary bullish scenario.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests PMH 657.47 within the first 60 min of RTH (by 10:30 ET) and gets rejected — no 5m bar close above 657.47 — pulling back to at least 655.00 by end of session
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY prints a 5m bar close above 658.00 on above-average volume before 10:30 ET

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains above 25.00 throughout the entire RTH session (no intraday flush below 25.00), sustaining the HIGH-regime fear backdrop
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX drops below 25.00 within the first 30 min of RTH open, signaling a capitulation flush and reversing the macro bearish thesis

swarm_predictions.claim: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (105c spread, fast 654.74 / pivot 654.95 / slow 655.79) remains intact through the first 2 hours of RTH — no ribbon flip and no compression below 30c spread by 11:30 ET
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Fast EMA crosses above slow EMA OR ribbon spread compresses below 30c before 11:30 ET, indicating structural bearish momentum breakdown

synthesis_narrative: SPY enters 3/24 with a unanimous 4-of-4 bearish swarm vote — CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (105c spread), VIX 27.26 rising in HIGH regime, risk-off sector rotation (XLK −0.40%, XLF −0.87%, XLE +3.01%), and price sandwiched between PMH 657.47 (1.94 above) and prior RTH low 653.94 (1.59 below) with zero macro events creating a clean fear-driven tape. The key tension is at PMH 657.47: it is only 2-star strength (breakable ~35% of the time) and the validator correctly flags that overnight buyers defended 655.00 constructively despite rising VIX — a breakout to 658.00–659.00 is a real (if secondary) scenario the consensus underweights. The single most important watch at market open: whether the first RTH approach to 657.47 is rejected cleanly (confirming the primary bearish thesis targeting 653.94) or breaks and closes above 658.00 on volume (full thesis invalidation).

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon 105c spread; last 3 bars mixed (RED+GREEN+GREEN) zero-volume premarket chop; price 655.53 above pivot but trapped 26c below slow EMA 655.79

macro.one_line: VIX 27.26 HIGH regime rising +4.17%; risk-off backdrop confirmed; zero events today = clean tape for fear-driven directional moves

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level PMH 657.47 as first RTH test; BEAR ribbon + elevated VIX bias toward rejection and pullback to support cluster 653.94–652.84

internals.one_line: Clear risk-off rotation: XLK −0.40%, XLF −0.87% dragging SPY; XLE +3.01% flight-to-safety; narrow negative breadth confirms bearish backdrop

validator.top_invalidation: PMH 657.47 is only 2-star (breakable ~35%); overnight buyers holding 655.00 constructively despite rising VIX is underweighted — a 658.00 open-breakout scenario is credible
